[org](<../../../../package.html>).[apache](<../../../package.html>).[flink](<../../package.html>).[api](<../package.html>)

# scala

####  package scala

The Flink Scala API. [org.apache.flink.api.scala.ExecutionEnvironment](<ExecutionEnvironment.html>) is the starting-point of any Flink program. It can be used to read from local files, HDFS, or other sources. [org.apache.flink.api.scala.DataSet](<DataSet.html>) is the main abstraction of data in Flink. It provides operations that create new DataSets via transformations. [org.apache.flink.api.scala.GroupedDataSet](<GroupedDataSet.html>) provides operations on grouped data that results from org.apache.flink.api.scala.DataSet.groupBy().

Use [org.apache.flink.api.scala.ExecutionEnvironment.getExecutionEnvironment](<ExecutionEnvironment$.html#getExecutionEnvironment:org.apache.flink.api.scala.ExecutionEnvironment>) to obtain an execution environment. This will either create a local environment or a remote environment, depending on the context where your program is executing.
